name: Masquerade Elden Ring boot-init load behind a clean custom title cover

description: baseline current spike/boot-parallelization before title-cover masquerade changes

asi.hypothesis: Baseline establishes existing static/autoload proof score before implementing Part A title MenuWindowJob suppression or Part B custom cover injection.
asi.task_direction: Masquerade irreducible boot-init behind intentional title/loading visual; no ms target; validate A disable-native-title-view and B custom cover separately.
hard_constraints: do not touch STEP_Wait or CSMenuMan+0x21

description: attempted Part A BeginTitle native-title visual suppression but static measure failed to see constants/source anchors

asi.hypothesis: Suppress only the BeginTitle 05_000_Title MenuWindowJob wrapper and expose telemetry; extend the score so Part A and Part B are independently penalized.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary score did not improve because .auto/measure.sh checked constants in a source string that did not include src/constants.rs, so Part A was still reported missing; Part B remains missing by design.
asi.next_action_hint: Fix measure to include constants, then reapply the Part A hook/telemetry/checker changes and rerun. Keep the two-cover-failure scoring: old baseline remains comparable, Part A should reduce title_cover_failures from 2 to 1.
details: Ghidra decompile showed FUN_14081f9f0 only constructs CSScaleformLoadInfo filename 05_000_Title and calls FUN_1407acbf0.
Implementation shape used a MinHook detour returning param_1 after writing null to *out_slot, matching factory allocation-failure shape.
Need rerun static checker after reapply; check-autoload-happy-path had passed before measure failure.

description: Part A suppresses native 05_000_Title BeginTitle visual wrapper and exposes telemetry

asi.hypothesis: Part A can hide the native title view safely by detouring only BeginTitle's 05_000_Title wrapper (0x14081f9f0) and returning a null MenuWindowJob out slot, leaving TitleStep/STEP_Wait/native Continue untouched.
asi.evidence: Static Ghidra: dump 0x14081fae0 (deobf 0x14081f9f0) builds CSScaleformLoadInfo filename 05_000_Title then calls factory 0x1407acbf0; deobf/dump shift +0xf0 verified by scripts/dump-deobf-shift.py --reverse.
asi.score_reason: title_cover_failures reduced from 2 to 1; remaining title_cover failure is Part B custom cover render path not yet implemented.
asi.next_action_hint: Implement Part B custom image render path or resolve asset blocker: inspect 05_001_Title_Logo for dummy texture remap; otherwise author a small Scaleform target referencing MENU_DummyProfileFace_NN/SYSTEX_Menu_ProfileNN. Then runtime-validate A and B separately.

description: Resolved Part B asset fork: 05_001_Title_Logo has no dummy-profile/SYSTEX texture symbol

asi.hypothesis: Part B should stop targeting 05_001_Title_Logo directly if its extracted GFX has no MENU_DummyProfileFace/SYSTEX symbol; a custom Scaleform target or different dummy-profile surface is required.
asi.evidence: Offline asset strings from /home/banon/er-extract/nuxe-menu-20260619-170932/menu/05_001_title_logo.gfx list static title textures (MENU_Title_GR, MENU_Title_EldenRing, MENU_DS3_LOGO, MENU_Title_EldenRing_01) and no MENU_DummyProfileFace or SYSTEX_Menu_Profile. Control 05_000_title.gfx also lacks profile dummy symbols.
asi.score_reason: Part B asset-decision penalty cleared; remaining title_cover_penalty=50 is the actual custom cover render implementation/proof.
asi.next_action_hint: Implement/render a custom cover target referencing MENU_DummyProfileFace_NN / SYSTEX_Menu_ProfileNN, or find an existing Scaleform surface with those symbols; do not keep trying 05_001_Title_Logo remap.
